Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured laboratory values are within normal limits. There is no evidence of renal dysfunction, electrolyte imbalance, dyslipidemia, or abnormal glucose metabolism. The microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, indicating no significant proteinuria. Overall, these results suggest stable metabolic and renal status for this 84-year-old female patient.
